title: stenotus caespitosus
intro: Stenotus caespitosus, also known as mountain sneezeweed or mountain sneeze weed, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. It has been used to treat various health issues such as colds, flu, respiratory problems, and skin irritations, offering benefits such as relieving congestion, reducing inflammation, and soothing skin conditions. Stenotus caespitosus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in salves and ointments for topical applications.
